title:
Lesson 1:
I Can't Hear You / There's Noise
description: 'Duymadım' = I didn't hear (past). 'Seni duymuyorum' = I can't hear you (present). 'Çok gürültü var' = There's a lot of noise. 'Bir ses duydum' = I heard a sound.

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.english: Can you repeat? I can't hear you.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.turkish: Burada çok gürültü var. Sonra arayabilir miyim?
dialogue.english: There's a lot of noise here. Can I call you later?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Tamam. Az önce bir ses duydun mu?
dialogue.english: Okay. Did you hear a sound just now?

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.english: I didn't hear. What was the sound?

dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.turkish: Dışarıdan bir ses duydum. Ne olduğunu bilmiyorum.
dialogue.english: I heard a sound from outside. I don't know what it was.
